name: coverage
_note: Range/coverage estimate per transport, derived from the REAL TRANSPORT_SPECS range strings + per-hop metres scaled by hop count. Pure compute over in-module constants — no STATE, no DB (NEVER no_db). hops is a fail-CLOSED numeric guard (poisoned NaN/Infinity/-1/1e308 → invalid_hops, never a clamped ok:true); absent hops defaults to 3.
